LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER ERROL VINCENT'S PETITION FOR ORDER APPOINTING ARBITRATOR, THE COURT NOMINATES RETIRED JUDGES INA GYEMANT, JOANNE PARILLI, DANIEL HANLON, JOHN HERLIHY AND WILLIAM STEIN AS POTENTIAL ARBITRATORS. THE COURT WILL CHOOSE AN ARBITRATOR FROM THIS LIST BY MINUTE ORDER UNLESS THE PARTIES NOTIFY THE COURT WITHIN 5 DAYS THAT THEY HAVE AGREED TO AN ARBITRATOR. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
